_comment_team: Flat global team. Entries with no 'repos' key apply to every repo. Add 'repos': ['my-backend'] to scope a member to specific repos.
_comment_teams_per_repo: Optional: explicit full per-repo team. If set for a repo, replaces team filtering for that repo entirely. Use only when you want a clean override.
_comment_model_routing: Optional: phase->model map shown in every pre_check so orchestrators spawn subagents on the right tier. 'escalate' is the tier named by the two-strikes escalation hint (2+ rejections by the same agent in the same area).
_comment_read_enforcement: Optional, default 'soft'. Controls the Read->SAN hook. 'soft': nudge toward get_san on raw reads of SAN-covered code (never blocks). 'hard': BLOCK a 2nd+ raw read of the same fresh-SAN file (first read always allowed) so agents actually use SAN — set BRAIN_SKIP_READ_BLOCK=1 to bypass when you truly need exact bytes.
